courseTitle: Game Systems, Loops, and Player Experience
title: Emergent Toy to Game Conversion
genericDescription: Differentiate toy, puzzle, and game; discover affordances through experimentation; add goals without killing expressive play.
specificDescription: First build a toy-like interaction system, then add goals, constraints, and feedback to turn it into a game. Submit the final game and a short captured comparison of the toy state and game state.
gradingRubric: 25 pts expressive interaction; 25 pts successful goal/rule conversion; 20 pts player freedom retained; 15 pts presentation of before/after; 15 pts notes.
